skills.manipulate_pages: Can create/edit/delete any Page using the $pages API
skills.schema_management: Can define new Fields and Templates via CLI or API
skills.schema_architect: Expert in designing complex relationships between templates and fields
skills.query_expert: Master of the ProcessWire Selector engine for complex data retrieval
skills.security_warden: Enforces strict input sanitization and granular permission checks
skills.module_scaffolder: Can build specialized Fieldtype, Inputfield, and Process modules
skills.system_admin: Manages users, roles, system logs, and maintenance tasks
